raw_response:
While both reports offer valuable insights, Variant A is the more useful and trustworthy report for me as the operator of Monsun. It provides a robust strategic framework grounded in a transparently diverse set of sources. Variant B, despite presenting some clever and highly specific metrics like review velocity and a "local guide" analysis, is critically undermined by its sourcing. It claims to have analyzed multiple platforms but only lists Google in its drawer, creating a credibility gap. Variant A's central concept of the "authenticity spectrum" is a powerful mental model that helps me understand my exact market position, my competitors' roles, and the root cause of customer sentiment. This strategic clarity, combined with concrete, actionable feedback on my hero dishes, operational friction points, and defensive management tone, makes it the superior tool for guiding both immediate improvements and long-term brand strategy.

```json
{"winner": "A", "dimensions": {"coverage": "TIE", "specificity": "B", "source_diversity": "A", "actionability": "TIE", "specialist_set_correctness": "TIE"}, "supporting_urls": ["https://www.google.com/maps/", "https://trojmiasto.pl/forum/", "https://wolt.com/", "https://kukbuk.pl/"]}
```
